description: The principles that guide our decisions and define who we are.

items.title: Innovation First
items.description: We challenge the status quo and continuously push boundaries.

items.title: Excellence
items.description: We hold ourselves to the highest standards in everything we ship.

items.title: Integrity
items.description: We do the right thing, even when no one is watching.

items.title: Sustainability
items.description: We build for the long term and consider our impact on the world.
